# Quarterly Business Review - Q4 2025

## Executive Summary

Overall business performance met expectations with steady growth across all segments.
Customer retention rate improved to 94% from 91% in the previous quarter.

## Financial Highlights

Revenue grew 15% year-over-year. Operating margins remained stable at 22%.
The company maintained a healthy cash position throughout the quarter.

## Product Updates

Three major feature releases were completed on schedule. User engagement metrics
showed positive trends across all key indicators.

## Outlook

The team is well-positioned for continued growth in the coming quarter with a strong
pipeline of product improvements and market expansion opportunities.
